assertions.description: Browsers that ship speculation rules accept <script type=speculationrules> as a valid script type.
The feature route serves referenced rule documents as application/speculationrules+json.
A document response can carry both a restrictive script-src CSP and a Speculation-Rules header.
Chrome fetches a rule document referenced by the Speculation-Rules header even when the document has script-src 'none'.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const token=(crypto.randomUUID?.()||`${Date.now()}${Math.random()}`).replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g,'');const probe=new URL('/v131/exempt-speculation-rules-header-from-csp-restrictions/spec-rules-csp/header-probe',location.origin);probe.searchParams.set('token',token);probe.searchParams.set('preset','locked');probe.searchParams.set('rules','"/rules.json"');probe.searchParams.set('mode','document');const status=new URL('/v131/exempt-speculation-rules-header-from-csp-restrictions/spec-rules-csp/probe-status',location.origin);status.searchParams.set('token',token);const probeWindow=window.open(probe.href,'sr_conformance_probe','popup,width=520,height=300');if(!probeWindow)return false;try{for(let i=0;i<24;i++){const result=await (await fetch(status,{cache:'no-store'})).json();if(result.ruleRequests&&result.ruleRequests.includes('/rules.json'))return true;await new Promise(resolve=>setTimeout(resolve,150));}return false;}finally{probeWindow.close();}})()

assertions.description: A Speculation-Rules header can contain a Structured Field list with multiple rule document URL strings.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const token=(crypto.randomUUID?.()||`${Date.now()}${Math.random()}`).replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g,'');const rules='"/prefetch-rules.json", "/prerender-rules.json"';const echo=new URL('/v131/exempt-speculation-rules-header-from-csp-restrictions/spec-rules-csp/header-probe',location.origin);echo.searchParams.set('token',token);echo.searchParams.set('preset','locked');echo.searchParams.set('rules',rules);echo.searchParams.set('mode','echo');const response=await fetch(echo,{cache:'no-store'});const emitted=decodeURIComponent(response.headers.get('Speculation-Rules')||response.headers.get('X-Demo-Speculation-Rules')||'');const probe=new URL(echo.href);probe.searchParams.set('mode','document');const status=new URL('/v131/exempt-speculation-rules-header-from-csp-restrictions/spec-rules-csp/probe-status',location.origin);status.searchParams.set('token',token);const probeWindow=window.open(probe.href,'sr_conformance_multi_probe','popup,width=520,height=300');if(!probeWindow)return false;try{for(let i=0;i<24;i++){const result=await (await fetch(status,{cache:'no-store'})).json();if(result.ruleRequests&&result.ruleRequests.includes('/prefetch-rules.json')&&result.ruleRequests.includes('/prerender-rules.json'))return emitted.includes('/prefetch-rules.json')&&emitted.includes('/prerender-rules.json');await new Promise(resolve=>setTimeout(resolve,150));}return false;}finally{probeWindow.close();}})()
